title: Ticket 417: Payments timing out after token exchange
summary: Checkout confirmations stall after the auth refresh step and recover on retry.
signals: 502 rate climbed immediately after the gateway deploy.
Only /v1/payments/confirm is timing out in production.
Staging succeeds when the refresh token is bypassed.

messages.text: Customer checkout fails after card entry. The spinner hangs for about 12 seconds, then the request dies.
The current thread points to a mismatch between token refresh latency and the confirm endpoint timeout budget. The strongest signal is that retry succeeds once the session is already warm.

title: Incident 402: Search indexing drift on product detail pages
summary: Fresh product edits are not reaching the public index consistently after the last worker restart.
signals: Index lag exceeds 40 minutes for edited SKUs.
Worker restart clears the backlog temporarily.
No matching errors appear in the public API response.

messages.text: Merchandising says updated descriptions are missing from search. The changes do show up on the product page itself.
The thread currently treats this as a queue health problem rather than a template render bug. Drift starts after worker rotation and narrows to jobs sourced from the catalog sync topic.

title: Case 388: OAuth callback loops for invited teammates
summary: Invited users return from Google successfully but re-enter the callback route instead of landing in the workspace.
signals: Loop only affects invited users without an existing org membership.
The callback response sets state but drops the org slug.
Direct logins outside invitation flow behave normally.

messages.text: New teammates can authenticate, but the app keeps bouncing them back into /auth/callback until the browser gives up.
The preview thread suggests the org bootstrap path is missing a stable post-login destination. The callback sets session cookies, but the invited-user branch rebuilds the redirect target incorrectly.

title: Case 361: Analytics export stalls on large date ranges
summary: CSV exports complete for short windows but hang once the report spans more than 60 days.
signals: Queue times stay normal until the export worker hits memory limits.
Smaller date windows succeed without retry.
The stall begins during aggregation, not upload.

messages.text: Finance can export one month of analytics, but quarter-to-date downloads never finish.
The thread is converging on an aggregation memory spike. We are not seeing storage failures; the exporter is exhausting the worker budget before the file writer starts.

title: Case 344: Email digests sent with stale account names
summary: Nightly digests were rendering old account names from cached profile snapshots.
signals: Digest template used a cached display_name payload.
Manual resend after cache purge produced correct names.
No customer-facing failures remain after the hotfix.

messages.text: A few enterprise customers saw old account names in the digest header even though the admin UI showed the new ones.
This case is resolved. The thread shows the email renderer was reading profile snapshots from an outdated cache namespace, and the namespace bump cleared the stale payloads.
